wins_analysis: No wins today as none of the 4 pending orders were executed. Entry prices were set too far from market action, meaning price never reached the limit order levels during the session.
losses_analysis: No losses either, but the real failure is zero execution — all 4 orders remained pending. This indicates entry levels were placed at zone extremes that price did not revisit, effectively wasting the entire trading day with no exposure.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime (ADX 25, Nifty -0.9%) should have strongly favored the SELL setups (TATASTEEL, HDFCBANK), but entry prices were set too tight/high for sells — price likely gapped below or moved away without retesting those supply zone entries. The regime was correct but entry placement did not adapt to momentum-driven moves that skip retests.

improvements.action: For SELL setups in trending_down regime with ADX>=25, use market orders or set limit entries 0.1-0.2% below the ideal supply zone midpoint rather than at zone edge, accepting slightly worse R:R for higher fill probability
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL at 191.00 and HDFCBANK at 822.95 never filled — in strong downtrends, price often does not retest supply zones before continuing lower

improvements.action: Remove BUY setups entirely when regime is trending_down AND ADX>=25 AND weekly insight confirms all recent trades were losses — the AI probabilities of 28-35% are too low to justify counter-trend risk
improvements.reason: TCS BUY (35%) and WIPRO BUY (28-30%) were counter-trend with very low probabilities, wasting order slots that could have been used for additional SELL candidates

improvements.action: Set a minimum AI probability threshold of 50% for any order to be placed — today 3 of 5 setups had probability below 50% and none executed or would have been profitable in a down regime
improvements.reason: WIPRO and TCS BUY setups had 28-35% probability, well below coin-flip odds, and were placed as orders consuming capital allocation

improvements.action: Add a 'fill or cancel' timer — if a pending order is not filled within the first 90 minutes of the session, cancel it and look for fresh setups forming intraday at levels closer to current price
improvements.reason: All 4 orders sat pending for the entire session with zero fills, indicating stale levels that the market had already moved past

improvements.action: Expand SELL candidate scan to include other weak Nifty 50 names (e.g., metals, PSU banks) when regime is trending_down — having only 2 SELL candidates out of 50 stocks in a bearish regime suggests the scan filters are too restrictive
improvements.reason: Only 5 total setups found across 50 stocks with ADX=25 downtrend — likely missed SELL opportunities in other declining stocks

tomorrow_focus: Prioritize SELL setups with AI probability >55% using aggressive entry placement (closer to market or slight premium to fill), and completely skip BUY setups unless regime reverses or VIX spikes above 16.

symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Supply zone at 191 was not retested — if price is below 191 tomorrow, look for next supply zone or use intraday rally to 189-190 area as fresh short entry
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK: 822.95 entry not reached — if still trending down, look for a lower supply zone around 815-818 or enter on intraday pullback with market order
symbol_notes.TCS: Counter-trend BUY at 2167 not triggered — avoid until regime shifts; stock likely to follow broader market weakness
symbol_notes.WIPRO: Two BUY setups both unfilled — low probability (28-30%) in a downtrend means this should be removed from watchlist tomorrow unless it shows relative strength
